display.label: Column selector
display.description: Comma-separated list of column selectors (regular expressions) to match columns that should be converted. Format: <table_name>.<column_name>. Example: 'inventory.products.metadata,orders.*.data'

display.label: Character set
display.description: The character set used to decode RAW column bytes into strings. Defaults to UTF-8. For databases using a non-UTF-8 character set such as WE8ISO8859P1, this should be set to the corresponding Java charset name (e.g. 'ISO-8859-1'). Default: UTF-8
